message:
🌱 Add coredns: Add fallthrough to file plugin, or add wildcards to hosts mission (#1544)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "coredns-4545-add-fallthrough-to-file-plugin-or-add-wildcards-to-hosts-plugin",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "coredns: Add fallthrough to file plugin, or add wildcards to hosts plugin",
+    "description": "Add fallthrough to file plugin, or add wildcards to hosts plugin. Requested by 12+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current coredns deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your coredns version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nhelm list -n coredns 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working coredns installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review coredns configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant coredns configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl get configmap -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=coredns\n```\n**What would you like to be added**:\nEither of these:\n1. fallthrough for `file` plugin\n2."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add fallthrough to file plugin, or add wildcards to hosts…",
+        "description": "My thoughts...\n\nThe _hosts_ plugin intends to follow the established format of a hosts file, which does not support wildcard notation. https://github.com/coredns/coredns/issues/4516#issuecomment-797362900\n\nFallthrough behavior has occasionally been requested for the _file_ plugin, but not adopted.\n```yaml\ntemplate IN ANY x.net {\n        match \"\\w*\\.(x.net\\.)$\"\n        answer \"{{ .Name }} 3600 IN A 10.2.0.10\" \n        fallthrough\n    }\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n coredns -l app.kubernetes.io/name=coredns\nkubectl get events -n coredns --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add fallthrough to file plugin, or add wildcards to hosts…\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "My thoughts...\n\nThe _hosts_ plugin intends to follow the established format of a hosts file, which does not support wildcard notation. https://github.com/coredns/coredns/issues/4516#issuecomment-797362900\n\nFallthrough behavior has occasionally been requested for the _file_ plugin, but not adopted.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "template IN ANY x.net {\n        match \"\\w*\\.(x.net\\.)$\"\n        answer \"{{ .Name }} 3600 IN A 10.2.0.10\" \n        fallthrough\n    }"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "coredns",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "coredns"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns/issues/4545",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/coredns/coredns"
+    },
+    "reactions": 12,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with coredns installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-20T06:21:48.747Z",
